title: Mumbai Police
subTitle: ACP Antony Moses has managed to track down his friend's killer when he meets with an accident resulting in partial memory loss. Soon, he is reassigned to investigate the murder and find the culprit.

title: Leela
subTitle: Notorious for his relationships with women, a single Kuttiyappan's life takes a turn when he sets out to fulfil one of his strange dreams.

title: Iruvattom Manavatty
subTitle: During his stint on election duty, a veterinarian, Gautham, meets Bhumika and falls deeply in love. However, Bhumika fears her disapproving father, a staunch communist, finding out.

title: Vismayam
subTitle: Four people, a supermarket employee, a little girl, a housewife and a college student, deal with their everyday problems in life and try their best to overcome them.

title: Chirikkum Thalika
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the best rib-tickling comedy scenes from various Malayalam movies featuring renowned actors and actresses.

title: Happy Husbands
subTitle: The lives of three happily married men are turned upside down by the arrival of a bar singer. They are later reunited during a holiday in Malaysia.

title: Romancham
subTitle: A group of seven men attempt to conduct a seance, only to find themselves in a predicament when a spirit begins to answer their queries.

title: Philips and the Monkey Pen
subTitle: Ryan Philip is a mischieveous 8-year-old, struggles with math- and his strict teacher Pappan. However, everything changes when he discovers a magical pen that helps him solve all his problems.

title: Geetha Govindam
subTitle: Vijay Govind, a young lecturer in a college, wishes to get married at the earliest. He tries to woo Geetha, an independent and a level-headed woman, who is not easy to convince.

title: Bro Daddy
subTitle: Two close friends, John and Kurian, wish to take their friendship one step further and get their children married. However, they are unaware of the lives their children lead in the city.

title: Falimy
subTitle: A dysfunctional family travels to Varanasi in order to fulfil their grandfather's wish. However, the journey ends up being a life-altering one for them.

title: Falimy
subTitle: A dysfunctional family travels to Varanasi in order to fulfil their grandfather's wish. However, the journey ends up being a life-altering one for them.

title: Ranam
subTitle: Chinna moves to the city for his studies but gets into an altercation with Bhagawati's gang. Subsequently, his life takes a turn for the worse when he falls for Maheswari, Bhagawati's sister.

title: Olu
subTitle: A girl's spirit connects with a struggling painter, infusing his art with divine inspiration. Their love transcends earthly boundaries yet faces a perilous test when worldly temptations beckon.

title: Vishwaroopam 2
subTitle: Wisam Ahmad Kashmiri, a RAW agent, tries to prevent a terrorist organisation from executing a deadly mission against three countries.

title: Rakshadhikari Baiju Oppu
subTitle: Baiju, a government worker, lives in Kumbalam, a rusty little village on the outskirts of Kochi and is beloved by the locals. He spends his free time coaching local boys in cricket.

title: Malaikottai Vaaliban
subTitle: Malaikottai Vaaliban, an ageing warrior, returns to his village only to discover it has been overrun by colonisers. He challenges them to a fight, vowing to restore freedom.

title: Kochi Rajavu
subTitle: Unni and Ashwathy's life takes a turn after he accidentally kills her cousin in a tussle. After spending time in prison, he moves to Chennai with his family, hoping to start a fresh chapter, but his past catches up with him.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Aavesham
subTitle: Three boys move into a hostel to pursue engineering, where they clash with seniors. To get revenge, they befriend a gangster.

title: King of Kotha
subTitle: Heartbroken on being back-stabbed by his childhood friend, Raju, an influential man, runs away from his hometown, Kotha. Soon, to bring back order in the town, a police officer plots a plan.

title: King of Kotha
subTitle: Heartbroken on being back-stabbed by his childhood friend, Raju, an influential man, runs away from his hometown, Kotha. Soon, to bring back order in the town, a police officer plots a plan.

title: Mahanati
subTitle: Savitri, an energetic and jubilant child, grows up to become an actress. She faces several challenges and overcomes hurdles to become the first female superstar in South India.

title: C U Soon
subTitle: Jimmy gets ensnared in a web of uncertainty when his fiancée goes missing, leaving a suicide note. Later, Kevin assumes the mantle to unravel the enigma.

title: Athiran
subTitle: Dr Nair, a psychiatrist, visits a mental asylum located in a remote location in Kerala. He meets a patient, Nithya, who is kept in isolation, and soon uncovers mysteries from her past.

title: Chirikkum Thalika
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the best rib-tickling comedy scenes from various Malayalam movies featuring renowned actors and actresses.

title: Nanma
subTitle: For a living, Muthu extracts and disposes of corpses from rivers. Unknown to Muthu, his son becomes a henchman for a moneylender as he wants his father to have a respectable job.

title: Swarnam
subTitle: Divakaran is a selfish and miserly man. When he fails to buy a truck for himself, he goes after a mythical treasure hidden in a river.

title: Vettam
subTitle: Gopalakrishnan meets Veena while trying to smuggle a stolen necklace. Later, he accompanies Veena on her mission to unite with her lover.

title: Ananthabhadram
subTitle: To honour his mother's final wish, Ananthan attempts to light a lamp at the family temple. However, his quest is thwarted by an evil magician who seeks to harness the temple's hidden powers.

title: Kuberan
subTitle: Sidharthan helps a girl named Pooja to fight her haunted past, that includes her sadist husband and mother. Later, he helps her to move forward in life.

title: Ben Johnson
subTitle: Johnson, the honourable son of a dreaded local thug, decides to erase the bad image of his father in the society. He becomes a police officer and fights to bring criminals to justice.
